texto: I want to live my life to its fullest potential. I want to embrace my own purpose, however large or small it may be. I want to find my own Nehru moments and take positive steps toward becoming the person I am meant to be. The journey will undoubtedly be a winding one, filled with surprises and setbacks as well as gifts. But I'm ready to embrace it fully, wherever it may take me.
explicacao: Citação de Mallika Chopra sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I want to live my life to its fullest potential.
